summary: Frozen baseline: current arch d_model=128, 2.76M params, train 1-100 eval 101-200
comment: Iteration-0 reference for all gates. bf16 GPU get_result on users 101-200 (100 users, total equalized size 6,164,115). Rust float32 port is bit-exact to this arch (verify_rust). Throughput pending the batched Rust harness; arch-search iterations gate on LogLoss+state+size, throughput measured on the champion. Throughput 181.8 rev/s is the single-stream baseline (median of users 107/136/156 from the parity runs); the batched 3-thread harness will re-measure under the Wilcoxon protocol.

summary: iter1: halve d_model 128->64 (N_HEADS 4->2), 3.44x fewer params, half state
comment: d_model 128->64 (N_HEADS 4->2, K=32 kept). 804k params (3.44x fewer), per-card state 25.5 KiB (half). AHEAD -0.0208 (the 2.76M model overfits 100 users; smaller generalizes better); IMM +0.00177, only 0.00027 over the +0.0015 budget -> fails LogLoss gate on imm alone. Near-win. Next: recover imm via training tweak / wider rating head, or back off to d_model=96.

summary: iter2: d_model=64 + IMMEDIATE_SCALE=2.0 to recover imm via ahead-slack
comment: Dead end. Upweighting the 4-way rating CE made imm WORSE (0.3269, +0.0074), not better: overweighting rating distinctions distorts the binary recall calibration imm measures. Ahead still -0.011. Loss reweighting is the wrong lever for imm; revert IMMEDIATE_SCALE to 1.0. Next: WSD decay phase or widen head_p.

summary: iter3 CHAMPION: d_model=64 + WSD decay phase; both modes beat iter0, 3.44x fewer params
comment: CHAMPION. d_model=64 (N_HEADS=2,K=32) + 2-epoch cosine decay on the iter1 WS checkpoint, IMMEDIATE_SCALE=1.0. imm 0.318373 (-0.0011) and ahead 0.358576 (-0.0155) BOTH BEAT iter0 -> all gates PASS WITH HEADROOM (the full budget is preserved for future iterations). The WS-only iter1 was +0.0018 over on imm; the decay annealing recovered it below baseline. 3.44x fewer params (804k), half per-card state (25.5 KiB). New base. Note: iter0 was WS-only; the decay phase is a training improvement the protocol allows. Throughput pending the batched harness. Rust parity re-verify (d_model=64) deferred to a champion-parity pass.
